description: Master variable library for QMS portal templates, forms, and documents. Enhanced with global ERP variables from SAP, Oracle, Epicor Kinetic, Microsoft Dynamics 365, Infor, IFS, SYSPRO, QAD, Plex. Cross-referenced with document_type_registry.json, form_control_registry.json, core-standards/15-evidence-and-records-naming.md, and portal api.php.

document_header.label: Document Header Variables
document_header.description: Variables appearing in the header block of every controlled QMS document (SOP, WI, ANNEX, FRM, JD, etc.)

doc_id.label: Document ID
doc_id.description: Unique document identifier per the QMS document numbering scheme

doc_title_vi.label: Document Title (Vietnamese)
doc_title_vi.example: Bao cao khong phu hop, hanh dong khac phuc va phan ung IPQC

doc_type.label: Document Type
doc_type.description: Category code derived from the document prefix

doc_category.label: Document Category
doc_category.description: Portal navigation category for document classification

rev.label: Revision
rev.description: Document revision number with major.minor versioning

effective_date.label: Effective Date
effective_date.description: Date when the document revision becomes effective

department_label.label: Department Label
department_label.description: Human-readable department name resolved from department code

department_label_vi.label: Department Label (Vietnamese)
department_label_vi.description: Vietnamese department name resolved from department code

author.label: Author / Prepared By
author.description: Name of the person who prepared or drafted the document

reviewer.label: Reviewed By
reviewer.description: Name of the person who reviewed the document

approver.label: Approved By
approver.description: Name of the person who approved the document

control_status.label: Control Status
control_status.description: Formal control status of the document in the registry

iso_clause.label: ISO Clause Reference
iso_clause.description: ISO 9001 / AS9100 clause references covered by the document

owner_role.label: Document Owner Role
owner_role.label_vi: Vai tro chu so huu tai lieu
owner_role.description: Role title of the document owner responsible for maintenance

change_history_rev.label: Change History - Revision
change_history_rev.label_vi: Lich su thay doi - Phien ban
change_history_rev.description: Revision number entry in document change history table

change_history_date.label: Change History - Date
change_history_date.description: Date entry in document change history table

change_history_description.label: Change History - Description
change_history_description.label_vi: Lich su thay doi - Mo ta
change_history_description.example: Added IPQC reaction flow per audit finding AUD-2026-IA02
change_history_description.description: Description of changes made in the revision

record_identification.label: Record Identification Variables
record_identification.description: Variables used to uniquely identify records (NCR, CAPA, FAI, CAL, AUD, etc.) per the naming standard

record_id.label: Record ID
record_id.description: Unique record identifier generated by the counter system

sequence_number.label: Sequence Number
sequence_number.description: Auto-incremented sequence number from the counter file

fiscal_year.label: Fiscal Year
fiscal_year.description: Calendar year component of the record ID

counter_digits.label: Counter Digits
counter_digits.description: Number of digits for zero-padding in the record ID sequence

form_code.label: Form Code
form_code.description: Associated form code for the record type

sharepoint_path.label: SharePoint Path
sharepoint_path.description: SharePoint folder path where the record is stored

source_record.label: Source Record
source_record.description: Parent record that triggered this record (e.g., NCR that spawned a CAPA)

job_context.label: Job Context Variables
job_context.description: Variables related to CNC machining job orders, part identification, and production context

job_number.label: Job Number
job_number.description: Epicor job order number used as the primary production tracking key

part_number.label: Part Number
part_number.description: Customer part number identifying the manufactured component

part_rev.label: Part Revision
part_rev.description: Drawing revision letter of the part

part_name.label: Part Name / Description
part_name.description: Descriptive name of the part from the Epicor part master

customer.label: Customer
customer.description: Customer name from Epicor customer master

sales_order.label: Sales Order
sales_order.description: Epicor sales order number linked to the job

lot_number.label: Lot Number
lot_number.description: Material lot or batch number for traceability

quantity_ordered.label: Quantity Ordered
quantity_ordered.description: Total quantity ordered by the customer

quantity_shipped.label: Quantity Shipped
quantity_shipped.description: Total quantity shipped on this shipment

heat_lot.label: Heat / Lot Number (Material)
heat_lot.label_vi: So lo nhiet luyen / vat lieu
heat_lot.description: Supplier heat or lot number from the mill certificate

machine_family.label: Machine Family
machine_family.description: CNC machine family for engineering baseline file naming

personnel.label: Personnel Variables
personnel.description: Variables identifying employees, roles, and organizational assignments

employee_id.label: Employee ID
employee_id.description: Unique employee identifier from Epicor Employee Master

user_id_code.label: UserID Code
user_id_code.description: Short UserID for file naming per standard 15 section 5 (derived from initials)

department_assignment.label: Department Assignment
department_assignment.description: Department to which the employee is assigned

auditor.label: Auditor
auditor.description: Internal or external auditor conducting the audit

lead_auditor.label: Lead Auditor
lead_auditor.description: Lead auditor for the audit team

setup_person.label: Setup Technician
setup_person.description: Technician who performed the machine setup

action_owner.label: Action Owner
action_owner.description: Person responsible for completing an action item

attendees.label: Attendees
attendees.example: Nguyen Van A, Tran Binh H, Le Minh C
attendees.description: List of attendees at a meeting or training

equipment.label: Equipment & Tooling Variables
equipment.label_vi: Bien thiet bi va dung cu
equipment.description: Variables for CNC machines, tools, fixtures, gages, and other manufacturing assets

machine_id.label: Machine ID
machine_id.description: Unique machine identifier from the equipment master

machine_type.label: Machine Type
machine_type.description: Type classification of the CNC machine

resource_group.label: Resource Group
resource_group.description: Epicor resource group for capacity planning

tool_description.label: Tool Description
tool_description.description: Descriptive name of the cutting tool

tool_life_remaining.label: Tool Life Remaining (%)
tool_life_remaining.label_vi: Tuoi tho dung cu con lai (%)
tool_life_remaining.description: Percentage of expected tool life remaining

calibration_due.label: Calibration Due Date
calibration_due.description: Next calibration due date for the equipment

asset_type.label: Asset Type
asset_type.description: Asset type prefix for Pattern 6 naming

asset_id.label: Asset ID
asset_id.description: Combined asset type and identifier for Pattern 6 naming

quality_inspection.label: Quality Inspection Variables
quality_inspection.description: Variables for dimensional inspection, SPC, AQL sampling, and measurement data

characteristic.label: Characteristic
characteristic.description: Name of the dimensional or geometric characteristic being inspected

nominal.label: Nominal Value
nominal.description: Target or nominal dimension value from the drawing

tolerance.label: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Tolerance range expressed as plus/minus or total band

sample_size.label: Sample Size
sample_size.description: Number of parts sampled for inspection

aql_level.label: AQL Level
aql_level.description: Acceptable Quality Level and inspection level per ANSI/ASQ Z1.4

accept_number.label: Accept Number (Ac)
accept_number.description: Maximum number of defects to accept the lot

reject_number.label: Reject Number (Re)
reject_number.description: Minimum number of defects to reject the lot

defects_found.label: Defects Found
defects_found.description: Number of defective parts found in the sample

lot_disposition.label: Lot Disposition
lot_disposition.description: Disposition decision for the inspected lot

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)
cpk.label_vi: Chi so nang luc qua trinh Cpk

ppk.label: Process Performance Index (Ppk)
ppk.label_vi: Chi so hieu suat qua trinh Ppk

x_bar.label: Sample Mean (X-bar)
x_bar.description: Mean of sample measurements for SPC

sigma.label: Standard Deviation
sigma.description: Standard deviation of the measured values

measurement_method.label: Measurement Method
measurement_method.description: Description of the measurement method or equipment used

ncr_capa.label: NCR / CAPA Variables
ncr_capa.description: Variables for nonconformance reports, corrective and preventive actions

defect_description.label: Defect Description
defect_description.example: Bore diameter 25.430mm exceeds USL 25.425mm on 3 of 13 samples

root_cause.label: Root Cause
root_cause.example: Tool wear exceeded limit without detection; offset not updated after 200 cycles
root_cause.description: Identified root cause of the nonconformance

root_cause_method.label: Root Cause Method
root_cause_method.label_vi: Phuong phap phan tich nguyen nhan goc

containment_action.label: Containment Action
containment_action.label_vi: Hanh dong kiem soat tam thoi
containment_action.example: 100% sort of remaining lot; quarantine suspect inventory
containment_action.description: Immediate containment action to prevent further nonconforming product

corrective_action.label: Corrective Action
corrective_action.example: Implement tool-wear monitoring with automatic offset update at 150 cycles
corrective_action.description: Action to eliminate the root cause and prevent recurrence

preventive_action.label: Preventive Action
preventive_action.example: Add tool-wear check to setup sheet for all 5-axis jobs; train operators
preventive_action.description: Action to prevent occurrence in similar processes

verification_result.label: Verification Result
verification_result.description: Result of effectiveness verification after CAPA implementation

target_date.label: Target Date
target_date.description: Target completion date for the corrective action

completion_date_capa.label: Actual Completion Date
completion_date_capa.description: Actual date the corrective action was completed

rpn.label: Risk Priority Number (RPN)
rpn.label_vi: Chi so uu tien rui ro
rpn.description: Risk priority number = Severity x Occurrence x Detection

ncr_status.label: NCR Status
ncr_status.description: Current status of the NCR in its lifecycle

fai.label: First Article Inspection (FAI) Variables
fai.label_vi: Bien kiem tra san pham dau tien
fai.description: Variables specific to AS9102 First Article Inspection reports

fai_number.label: FAI Number
fai_number.description: Unique first article inspection report number

fai_type.label: FAI Type
fai_type.description: Type of FAI per AS9102 (Full, Partial for rev change, Delta for process change)

fai_reason.label: FAI Reason
fai_reason.description: Reason triggering the FAI per AS9102

balloon_number.label: Balloon Number
balloon_number.description: Balloon reference number on the ballooned drawing

design_requirement.label: Design Requirement
design_requirement.description: Specification or design requirement from the drawing

actual_result.label: Actual Result
actual_result.description: Actual measured result for the FAI characteristic

fai_form_number.label: FAI Form Number (AS9102)
fai_form_number.description: AS9102 form number: Form 1 (Part), Form 2 (Material/Process), Form 3 (Characteristics)

measurement_data.label: Measurement Data Reference
measurement_data.description: Reference to the measurement data file (P2 naming)

supplier.label: Supplier Variables
supplier.description: Variables for supplier management, SCARs, and purchasing

supplier_name.label: Supplier Name
supplier_name.description: Full legal name of the supplier

scar_number.label: SCAR Number
scar_number.description: Unique supplier corrective action report number

supplier_process_type.label: Supplier Process Type
supplier_process_type.label_vi: Loai qua trinh nha cung cap
supplier_process_type.description: Type of special process or supply category

exception_type.label: Exception Type
exception_type.description: Type of PO exception requiring approval

justification.label: Justification
justification.example: Sole source supplier; customer specification requires this vendor
justification.description: Business justification for the exception or deviation

training.label: Training & Competence Variables
training.label_vi: Bien dao tao va nang luc
training.description: Variables for training records, competence assessments, and certifications

training_topic.label: Training Topic
training_topic.example: SPC and Capability Control per SOP-604
training_topic.description: Subject or topic of the training session

training_type.label: Training Type
training_type.description: Type or delivery method of training

competence_level.label: Competence Level
competence_level.description: Competence matrix level code (e.g., C10L2 = Competence area 10, Level 2)

assessment_result.label: Assessment Result
assessment_result.description: Result of the competency assessment or test

assessment_score.label: Assessment Score
assessment_score.description: Numeric score from assessment or gate test

certification_expiry.label: Certification Expiry Date
certification_expiry.description: Expiration date of the certification or qualification

certification_body.label: Certification Body
certification_body.description: External organization that issued the certification

training_hours.label: Training Hours
training_hours.description: Duration of the training in hours

audit.label: Audit Variables
audit.description: Variables for internal and external audit records

audit_scope.label: Audit Scope
audit_scope.description: Scope or area covered by the audit

clause_reference.label: Clause Reference
clause_reference.description: Standard clause referenced by the audit finding

finding_description.label: Finding Description
finding_description.example: Setup sheet not signed by shift leader before production start on 2 of 5 jobs sampled
finding_description.description: Detailed description of the audit finding

audit_score.label: Audit Score
audit_score.description: Overall audit score or compliance percentage

next_audit_date.label: Next Audit Date
next_audit_date.description: Scheduled date for the next audit

calibration.label: Calibration Variables
calibration.description: Variables for calibration records and gage management

next_due.label: Next Calibration Due
next_due.description: Next calibration due date based on calibration interval

uncertainty.label: Measurement Uncertainty
uncertainty.description: Expanded measurement uncertainty with coverage factor

standard_used.label: Standard / Reference Used
standard_used.example: Grade 0 gage block set, NIST-traceable cert #CAL-2026-STD-001
standard_used.description: Reference standard or master used during calibration

grr_status.label: GR&R Status
grr_status.description: GR&R acceptance status per AIAG MSA guidelines

risk.label: Risk Management Variables
risk.description: Variables for risk assessment, FMEA, and risk review records

risk_category.label: Risk Category
risk_category.description: Category of the risk being assessed

risk_description.label: Risk Description
risk_description.example: Single-source supplier for titanium bar stock may cause delivery disruption

likelihood.label: Likelihood
likelihood.description: Likelihood rating of the risk occurring

impact.label: Impact / Severity
impact.description: Impact or severity rating if the risk materializes

risk_level.label: Risk Level
risk_level.description: Calculated risk level based on likelihood x impact

mitigation_action.label: Mitigation Action
mitigation_action.example: Qualify secondary Ti supplier; maintain 4-week safety stock
mitigation_action.description: Planned action to mitigate the risk

residual_risk.label: Residual Risk Level
residual_risk.description: Risk level remaining after mitigation actions

risk_owner.label: Risk Owner
risk_owner.description: Person or role responsible for monitoring and mitigating the risk

review_period.label: Review Period
review_period.description: Period under review for risk assessment or management review

engineering.label: Engineering Change Variables
engineering.description: Variables for engineering change requests, revision control, and CAM programs

change_type.label: Change Type
change_type.description: Type of engineering change being requested

change_reason.label: Change Reason
change_reason.example: Customer drawing revision from Rev A to Rev B; added 2 new features
change_reason.description: Reason or justification for the engineering change

change_description.label: Change Description
change_description.example: Added 2 threaded holes M6x1.0 on face B; tightened bore tolerance from +/-0.05 to +/-0.025
change_description.description: Detailed description of the engineering change

impact_assessment.label: Impact Assessment
impact_assessment.example: Requires new NC program for OP10; new fixture pin placement; FAI required
impact_assessment.description: Assessment of the change impact on processes, tooling, and documentation

affected_documents.label: Affected Documents
affected_documents.example: FRM-302, NC program OP10, Control Plan, FAI
affected_documents.description: List of documents affected by the change

cam_program_id.label: CAM Program ID
cam_program_id.description: Engineering baseline program identifier per Pattern 3 naming

baseline_version.label: Baseline Version
baseline_version.description: Version number for engineering baseline files

ecr_status.label: ECR Status
ecr_status.description: Current status of the engineering change request

production.label: Production Variables
production.description: Variables for shift tracking, machine performance, and production metrics

machine_utilization.label: Machine Utilization (%)
machine_utilization.description: Percentage of available time the machine was running

oee.label: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
oee.label_vi: Hieu suat thiet bi toan bo
oee.description: OEE = Availability x Performance x Quality

cycle_time.label: Cycle Time (minutes)
cycle_time.description: Time to complete one part cycle

setup_time.label: Setup Time (minutes)
setup_time.description: Time spent setting up the machine for the job

reason_code.label: Downtime Reason Code
reason_code.description: Reason code for the downtime event

resolution.label: Downtime Resolution
resolution.example: Replaced broken end mill T-EM-10-001; re-qualified offset
resolution.description: Description of how the downtime was resolved

job_affected.label: Job Affected
job_affected.description: Job number affected by the downtime

first_pass_yield.label: First Pass Yield (%)
first_pass_yield.description: Percentage of parts passing inspection on first attempt

management_review.label: Management Review Variables
management_review.label_vi: Bien xem xet cua lanh dao
management_review.description: Variables for management review records per ISO 9001 clause 9.3

agenda_items.label: Agenda Items
agenda_items.example: Quality objectives review, Customer feedback analysis, Audit results
agenda_items.description: List of agenda items for the management review

action_items.label: Action Items
action_items.example: 1. Update quality objectives for Q2; 2. Conduct supplier audit for XYZ Co.
action_items.description: Action items resulting from the management review

next_review_date.label: Next Review Date
next_review_date.description: Scheduled date for the next management review

improvement.label: Continual Improvement Variables
improvement.description: Variables for improvement projects and kaizen tracking

project_title.label: Project Title
project_title.example: Reduce setup time on 5-axis machines by 20%

sponsor.label: Project Sponsor
sponsor.description: Executive sponsor of the improvement project

improvement_status.label: Improvement Status
improvement_status.label_vi: Trang thai du an cai tien
improvement_status.description: PDCA cycle status of the improvement project

naming_pattern.label: Naming Pattern Variables
naming_pattern.description: Variables used in the six naming patterns (P1-P6) from core-standards/15-evidence-and-records-naming.md

np_form_code.label: Form Code (P1)
np_form_code.description: Form code segment in Pattern 1 filled form naming

np_form_version.label: Form Version (P1)
np_form_version.description: Version of the blank form template used

np_scope.label: Scope Code
np_scope.description: Scope identifier per the Scope Code Dictionary (job, NCR, CAPA, audit, etc.)

np_date.label: Date Stamp (YYYYMMDD)
np_date.description: Compact date stamp for file naming

np_time_user.label: Time-UserID Stamp (HHMM-UserID)
np_time_user.description: Time and user ID stamp ensuring file uniqueness

np_record_type_code.label: Record Type Code (P2/P4)
np_record_type_code.description: Record type code from the RecordType Code Dictionary

np_job_num.label: Job Number (P2)
np_job_num.description: Job number segment in Pattern 2 job-tied evidence

np_part_rev.label: Part-Rev (P2/P3)
np_part_rev.description: Part number and revision combined for file naming

np_file_type.label: File Type Code (P3)
np_file_type.description: File type code for Pattern 3 engineering baseline naming

np_machine_family.label: Machine Family (P3)
np_machine_family.description: Machine family code for Pattern 3 naming

np_baseline_ver.label: Baseline Version (P3)
np_baseline_ver.description: Version number for engineering baseline files (P3)

np_form_title.label: Form Title (P5)
np_form_title.description: Hyphenated form title for blank form download naming (P5)

np_asset_type.label: Asset Type (P6)
np_asset_type.description: Asset type prefix for Pattern 6 naming

np_doc_type_p6.label: Document Type (P6)
np_doc_type_p6.description: Document type for asset record naming (P6)

np_extension.label: File Extension
np_extension.description: File extension per the allowed extensions in document_type_registry

portal_system.label: Portal System Variables
portal_system.description: Variables used by the QMS portal application (session, auth, permissions, UI state)

session_mfa_ok.label: MFA Verified
session_mfa_ok.description: Whether MFA (TOTP) has been verified for this session

session_last_active.label: Last Active Timestamp
session_last_active.description: Unix timestamp of last API activity (idle timeout = 4 hours)

current_user_username.label: Current User - Username
current_user_username.label_vi: Nguoi dung hien tai - Ten dang nhap
current_user_username.description: JavaScript currentUser.username for the authenticated user

current_user_name.label: Current User - Display Name
current_user_name.label_vi: Nguoi dung hien tai - Ten hien thi

current_user_role.label: Current User - Role
current_user_role.label_vi: Nguoi dung hien tai - Vai tro

current_user_dept.label: Current User - Department
current_user_dept.label_vi: Nguoi dung hien tai - Phong ban

is_admin.label: Is Admin
is_admin.description: Whether current user has admin privileges (it_admin, ceo, qa_manager)

can_create_docs.label: Can Create Documents
can_create_docs.description: Whether the user's role allows creating new documents

portal_language.label: Portal Language
portal_language.description: Selected language for the portal UI

session_preauth_user.label: Pre-Auth Username
session_preauth_user.label_vi: Ten dang nhap truoc xac thuc
session_preauth_user.description: Username stored during MFA enrollment/verification flow

session_preauth_started.label: Pre-Auth Started
session_preauth_started.description: Timestamp when pre-auth flow started (TTL = 10 min)

idle_timeout_seconds.label: Idle Timeout (seconds)
idle_timeout_seconds.label_vi: Thoi gian cho phep khong hoat dong (giay)
idle_timeout_seconds.description: Session idle timeout in seconds (default 4 hours = 14400)

form_delivery.label: Form Delivery & Control Variables
form_delivery.label_vi: Bien phan phoi va kiem soat bieu mau
form_delivery.description: Variables from the form control registry governing how forms are delivered and controlled

delivery_mode.label: Delivery Mode
delivery_mode.description: How the form is delivered to users

portal_behavior.label: Portal Behavior
portal_behavior.description: Portal behavior when user opens the form

desktop_excel_required.label: Desktop Excel Required
desktop_excel_required.description: Whether the form requires desktop Excel (not browser-compatible)

browser_open_enabled.label: Browser Open Enabled
browser_open_enabled.label_vi: Cho phep mo tren trinh duyet
browser_open_enabled.description: Whether the form can be opened in the browser

sha256.label: SHA-256 Checksum
sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the controlled form file for integrity verification

release_workflow_id.label: Release Workflow ID
release_workflow_id.description: Identifier linking to the release workflow for the form

decision_score.label: Online Decision Score
decision_score.description: Score determining whether the record type should be an online form (per decision framework)

workflow_state.label: Workflow & Approval State Variables
workflow_state.label_vi: Bien trang thai quy trinh va phe duyet
workflow_state.description: Variables tracking document and form workflow state, approvals, and version history

workflow_status.label: Workflow Status
workflow_status.description: Current workflow status for document/form lifecycle

submitted_by.label: Submitted By
submitted_by.description: User who submitted the document for review/approval

submitted_date.label: Submitted Date
submitted_date.description: Timestamp when the document was submitted

approved_by.label: Approved By (Workflow)
approved_by.description: User who approved the document in the workflow

approved_date.label: Approved Date
approved_date.description: Timestamp when the document was approved

last_edit_by.label: Last Edited By
last_edit_by.description: Name of the last person who edited the document

last_edit_role.label: Last Edit Role
last_edit_role.description: Role of the last person who edited the document

last_edit_note.label: Last Edit Note
last_edit_note.example: Updated IPQC reaction flow per audit finding

version_history_entry.label: Version History Entry
version_history_entry.description: Individual version history entry logged by the portal

timestamp.label: Timestamp & Date Variables
timestamp.label_vi: Bien thoi gian va ngay thang
timestamp.description: Common timestamp and date format variables used across all records

created_at.label: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created

updated_at.label: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

closed_at.label: Closed At
closed_at.description: Timestamp when the record was closed

date_compact.label: Compact Date (YYYYMMDD)
date_compact.description: Compact date format used in file naming

time_compact.label: Compact Time (HHMM)
time_compact.description: Compact 24h time format used in file naming

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: Default timezone for the QMS system (UTC+7)

shipment.label: Shipment & Logistics Variables
shipment.description: Variables for packing, shipping, and delivery records

special_packaging_req.label: Special Packaging Requirements
special_packaging_req.label_vi: Yeu cau dong goi dac biet
special_packaging_req.example: VCI paper wrap; moisture barrier bag; desiccant; ASTM D3951
special_packaging_req.description: Special packaging requirements per customer specification

ehs.label: EHS / Safety Variables
ehs.label_vi: Bien an toan va moi truong
ehs.description: Variables for environment, health, and safety records

incident_id.label: Incident ID
incident_id.description: Unique safety incident or near-miss identifier

incident_description.label: Incident Description
incident_description.example: Coolant leak from CNC-5AX-003 created slip hazard near operator station
incident_description.description: Detailed description of the safety incident

corrective_action_ehs.label: EHS Corrective Action
corrective_action_ehs.example: Replaced coolant line seal; added drip tray; updated PM schedule
corrective_action_ehs.description: Corrective action taken to address the safety issue

finance.label: Finance / Costing Variables
finance.description: Variables for job costing, invoicing, and financial tracking

job_cost_total.label: Job Cost Total
job_cost_total.description: Total manufacturing cost for the job

material_cost.label: Material Cost
material_cost.description: Raw material cost for the job

labor_cost.label: Labor Cost
labor_cost.description: Direct labor cost for the job

overhead_cost.label: Overhead Cost
overhead_cost.description: Overhead cost allocated to the job

contamination_fod.label: Contamination & FOD Control Variables
contamination_fod.label_vi: Bien kiem soat nhiem ban va FOD
contamination_fod.description: Variables for contamination control, cleanliness, and FOD prevention

cleanliness_level.label: Cleanliness Level
cleanliness_level.description: Required cleanliness level per customer specification

fod_check_result.label: FOD Check Result
fod_check_result.description: Result of Foreign Object Debris inspection

cleaning_method.label: Cleaning Method
cleaning_method.description: Method used to clean the parts

packaging_material.label: Packaging Material
packaging_material.example: VCI paper, PE bag, foam insert

kpi_metrics.label: KPI & Performance Metrics
kpi_metrics.label_vi: Bien KPI va chi so hieu suat
kpi_metrics.description: Variables for key performance indicators and management dashboards

kpi_name.label: KPI Name
kpi_name.description: Name of the key performance indicator

kpi_target.label: KPI Target
kpi_target.description: Target value or threshold for the KPI

kpi_actual.label: KPI Actual
kpi_actual.description: Actual measured value for the KPI

kpi_status.label: KPI Status
